title: Netanyahu’s Critics Accuse Him of Running Israel as a U.S. ‘Vassal State’
summary_full: Critics pounced on the Israeli prime minister after President Trump claimed on social media he had persuaded him to call off “a major raid” on Hezbollah in Beirut.
summary_public: Critics pounced on the Israeli prime minister after President Trump claimed on social media he had persuaded him to call off “a major raid” on Hezbollah in Beirut.

IL.label: neutral
